features: Package Contents - - Include 2 packs high capacity compatible 17X CF217X toner cartridge, Compatible for HP 17A CF217A Toner Cartridge, Black.
Compatible Printers - - Suitable for use in HP LaserJet Pro M102 M102a M102w, HP LaserJet Pro MFP M130 M130fn M130fw M130nw M130a printers.
High Print Yields - - Up to 4,000 pages per black toner cartridge, 5% coverage at A4 pager, based on ISO / IEC 19752.
Print Advantages - - Refined toner powder and high-quality cartridge, deliver accurate bright color, sharp black and crisp graphics.
Reliable Warranty - - Timely after-sales and quality assurance services, let you to enjoy the fun of printing easily.
